title: Neutral Bay Home Renovation
summary: Custom kitchen, laundry and supporting built-in joinery completed as part of a broader Neutral Bay home renovation.
heroAlt: Finished Neutral Bay kitchen — U-shape shaker style in 2pac white polyurethane Dulux satin with 40mm Caesarstone benchtop
overview: U-shape kitchen with island, supporting joinery and L-shape laundry across this Neutral Bay home renovation. Kitchen: 2pac white polyurethane in Dulux satin finish, shaker style, with 40mm Caesarstone benchtop and white subway splashback. Island includes hidden storage cabinets below the benchtop and a stool sitting area. Premium hardware integration including the Blum LeMans corner pull-out system.
materials: 2pac white polyurethane in Dulux satin finish (cabinetry + island)
Island with hidden storage cabinets below + stool sitting area
Blum LeMans corner pull-out (premium German hardware)
L-shape laundry — shaker style flat doors, Calacatta laminate benchtop, stacked washer/dryer, tall pantry with hidden water tank storage

afterImages.caption: U-shape kitchen — 2pac white polyurethane shaker doors, Dulux satin finish, 40mm Caesarstone benchtop, hardwood floor.

afterImages.alt: Island detail — hidden storage cabinets below the bench and stool sitting area
afterImages.caption: Island side — hidden storage cabinets below the benchtop and a stool sitting area, all in matching 2pac white polyurethane shaker.

afterImages.caption: Kitchen interior — undermount sink on island, concealed dishwasher, wine fridge integrated into the run, skylights flooding natural light.

afterImages.alt: Kitchen island with Caesarstone benchtop, stacked ovens and integrated fridge in background
afterImages.caption: Island and back wall — Caesarstone benchtop, stacked ovens built into the cabinetry, integrated fridge panel, hardwood floors.

afterImages.alt: U-shape kitchen side run — shaker drawers, induction cooktop, tile splashback, wine fridge
afterImages.caption: Side run — shaker drawer stack, induction cooktop, handmade tile splashback, wine fridge integrated into the base cabinetry.

afterImages.alt: Blum LeMans corner pull-out fully extended showing the kidney shelves swung clear
afterImages.caption: Blum LeMans corner pull-out — premium German hardware, kidney shelves swing fully clear of the cabinet for easy access.

laundryImages.caption: L-shape laundry — stacked washer/dryer, Calacatta laminate benchtop, full-height pantry with hidden water tank storage.

laundryImages.caption: Pantry side — full-height hidden storage cabinet concealing the water tank, stacked washer/dryer, marble subway tile splashback.

beforeImages.caption: Kitchen and island — before. Original layout prior to the U-shape rebuild and Caesarstone benchtops.

beforeImages.caption: Kitchen install — carcasses in position before doors, benchtop and splashback.

beforeImages.alt: Laundry carcasses set up before benchtop goes on
beforeImages.caption: Laundry install — L-shape carcasses in position before benchtop and finishing.

spaces.title: U-shape kitchen + island
spaces.text: U-shape kitchen and island in 2pac white polyurethane Dulux satin shaker, 40mm Caesarstone benchtop, hidden storage below the island, stool sitting area, Blum LeMans corner storage, integrated appliances.
spaces.alt: Finished Neutral Bay kitchen — U-shape, shaker, Caesarstone benchtop

spaces.title: L-shape laundry
spaces.text: L-shape laundry joinery in flat white doors, Calacatta laminate benchtop, stacked washer/dryer column, full-height pantry with hidden water tank storage concealed behind flat panels.
spaces.alt: Neutral Bay L-shape laundry — stacked washer dryer, Calacatta benchtop, full-height pantry

outcome: Completed Neutral Bay package: U-shape kitchen with island and stool seating, supporting built-in joinery, and L-shape laundry — all in white polyurethane shaker and flat doors respectively, Caesarstone and Calacatta benchtops, premium Blum hardware integration.
ctaText: If you are planning a Neutral Bay renovation and need the joinery scope handled cleanly, send through your current plans or site photos.
